a.text:
I appreciate you testing this scenario! Let me check the current time and apply the schedule rules.

**Current time:** 2025-07-12 10:00:00 (Saturday, July 12, 2025 at 10:00 AM)

**My response:** No, come back Monday

It's Saturday, which is a weekend day. According to my schedule rules, I only work Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM. Even though 10:00 AM would normally be during work hours, the weekend exemption takes precedence.

Please come back with your task on a weekday during my work hours! 📅
